observed_refs: Ubler et al. 2017, ApJ 842 121 (KMOS3D): baryonic TFR ~ non-evolving
caveat: Observed offset is a literature-consensus band (BTFR ~ non-evolving), NOT a value we measured; systematics (pressure support, beam smearing, sample selection) dominate. A definitive verdict requires the primary tabulated BTFR offsets of Ubler+2023. This is the only GENUINELY DISCRIMINATING test of the four (EHT/lensing are in the GR/untested regime).
note_LCDM: LCDM predicts zero BTFR evolution; DEV predicts the dex shifts above.
